name: Armuchee Valley Community Center
description: Armuchee Valley Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in LaFayette, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: LaFayette Rec Gym
description: Come play pickleball at LaFayette Rec Gym in LaFayette, GA! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
